name: Glendale Field (Valley Flyers)
guestNotes: Members only — but you're a member.
notes: Restrictions: .40 size nitro/electric fixed wing, helicopters, small drones. No FPV or racing. 400ft altitude limit.

name: Apollo XI Field (Valley Flyers)
guestNotes: Guest pilots welcome with AMA card.
notes: Same parent club as Glendale (AMA #152). 700+ members. Class D under VNY tower — letter of agreement in place.

name: Ventura County Comets RC
guestNotes: Guest pilots welcome with AMA card.
notes: Lake Casitas. Multi-rotor permitted. Free instruction available.

name: Antelope Valley Tailwinds
address: Challenger Way (10th St E) between Aves F & G, Lancaster, CA
guestNotes: AMA chartered. Contact club for guest policy.
notes: 600' x 40' concrete runway, paved pit area. Mailing: PO Box 302, Lancaster CA 93548. ~1hr drive.

name: Tehachapi Crosswinds
address: Corner of Abajo & Neely Ave, Tehachapi, CA
guestNotes: Saturdays = "Freebee Flight Day" — newcomers fly free with instructor.
notes: Mailing: PO Box 1283, Tehachapi CA 93581. ~2hr drive.

name: Victor Valley R/C Flyers
guestNotes: AMA chartered. Contact club for guest policy.
notes: High desert location. ~1.5hr drive from Burbank.

name: Canyon Crosswinds
guestNotes: AMA chartered. Contact via AMA Club Finder for current details.
notes: Closest non-LA Basin field — short drive from Burbank.

name: Conejo Valley Flyers
guestNotes: AMA chartered. Contact club for guest policy.
notes: 400ft x 40ft synthetic-surface runway. ~30 min west of Burbank.

name: Simi Valley Flyers
guestNotes: AMA chartered. Contact club for guest policy.

name: San Gabriel Valley RC League
address: Whittier Narrows Regional Park, 1601 Rosemead Blvd S, El Monte, CA 91733
guestNotes: AMA chartered. Contact club for guest policy.
notes: Whittier Narrows is one of LA County's two designated drone-allowed parks. ~30-40 min east of Burbank.

name: Santa Fe Dam RC Modelers
address: Santa Fe Dam Recreation Area, Duarte, CA
guestNotes: AMA chartered. Contact club for guest policy.
notes: Santa Fe Dam is the other LA County designated drone-allowed park. ~40 min east.

name: Pomona Valley Model Airplane Club
address: Prado Field, Chino, CA (also Norton Field, San Bernardino)
guestNotes: AMA chartered. Contact club for guest policy.
notes: 800ft x 50ft asphalt runway with covered pit area at Prado.
